title: Setup GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
description:
Create automated testing and deployment workflow for the project management dashboard.

Scope:
1. Create .github/workflows/test.yml with:
   - Python testing on push and PR
   - Coverage reporting
   - Linting checks
2. Add pytest-cov and flake8 to requirements.txt
3. Add .flake8 config file
4. Configure codecov.io integration

Goal: Ensure code quality and prevent regressions with automated CI.
completion_summary:
Successfully set up CI/CD pipeline:

1. Created .github/workflows/test.yml:
   - Python testing on push/PR to main/develop
   - Tests across Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12
   - Flake8 linting with error and warning modes
   - pytest with coverage reporting (app.py, convert_tasks.py)
   - Codecov integration for coverage uploads
   - Docker build job on main push

2. Updated requirements.txt:
   - Added pytest, pytest-cov, flake8

3. Created .flake8 config:
   - max-line-length: 127
   - max-complexity: 10
   - Excludes common dirs
   - Ignores PEP8 conflicts with Black

Next steps: Add Docker support (task-007)
